title: Generate valid install smoke evidence

sources.reason: The current smoke run rejects renamed historical Summary commands against the installed check catalog.
The install smoke step copies unrelated historical evidence instead of producing evidence in the installed repository.
The --create-adoption workflow generates a bounded Contract and Summary for first-install verification.

riskAssessment.reason: The smoke workflow must validate installed evidence using the installed check catalog.

executionDecision.reason: The failing Summary entries and supported adoption workflow fully determine the CI correction.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Install smoke generates adoption evidence inside the temporary repository.
The generated adoption Work Item finishes and archives successfully.
check-ai-pr validates the complete installation diff using installed evidence.
Generic project quality remains verified as fail-closed before configuration.
guidelines: Do not copy or rename historical Work Item evidence as CI fixtures.
Generate verification evidence with the same installed check catalog that validates it.
Keep the generic stack quality commands fail-closed until project configuration.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: The user provided the failing smoke output and requested the repository issue be resolved.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
